note: Bumped 2026-05-28 from 300 KB → 310 KB to absorb @modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps App-class adoption (Phase 1.19b.3) — bootSequence now drives the ui/initialize handshake via App.connect(transport), and outbound tools/call dispatch + post-mount tool-result re-listening + host-context-changed observation all flow through the spec-canonical App event surfaces. Net added ~10 KB gz: mostly zod-v4 schemas the App class registers for every notification it speaks (toolresult, hostcontextchanged, toolinput, toolinputpartial, toolcancelled) plus the JSON-RPC Protocol class from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk that App extends. Acceptable cost — retired four hand-rolled window.message listeners (makeJsonRpcCaller's closure listener, installPostMountListener, ensurePostRpcToParentListener for outbound tools/call responses, host-context-emitter.attachListener) AND the hand-rolled installResizeObserver in favor of App's autoResize. Reading-B (Tier 2: result.toolOutput._meta) is RETIRED structurally — App.connect doesn't expose result.toolOutput, so every slice-meta delivery now flows through inline __GGUI_META__ or the spec-canonical ui/notifications/tool-result notification observed via app.addEventListener('toolresult'). Prior bump 2026-05-28 (282 KB → 300 KB): @ggui-ai/iframe-runtime adopted ext-apps theme/styles/fonts helpers for spec-canonical DOM application (Phase 1.19b.2). Prior bump 2026-05-26 (281 KB → 282 KB): spec-canonical postMessage resolver chain in bootSequence (#143) — superseded by Phase 1.19b.3 (the Tier 3 path is now App's native event surface). Prior bump 2026-05-23 (280 KB → 281 KB): @ggui-ai/wire's new dispatch-dedup module (~150 bytes gz) — the task-scoped duplicate-dispatch defense in useAction that closes the scenario-7 double-fire bug class. Prior bump 2026-05-14 (228 KB → 280 KB): absorbed Ajv 8 + ajv-formats (~31 KB gz) for the closed-shape validator the iframe runs symmetrically with the server. Load-bearing contributors: React 19 ~115 KB, zod + JSON-Schema processors ~60 KB, protocol root-barrel leak ~15 KB, Ajv ~31 KB, design + wire ~60 KB, ext-apps App + zod-v4 + sdk protocol ~25 KB. Followup 2026-05-28 (#273): postRpcToParentLegacy fallback retired — dispatch-routing.test.ts now injects an App via setCurrentApp + MockTransport so the legacy raw-postMessage tools/call pump (+ its window.message listener and pending-id bookkeeping) deletes cleanly. Followup 2026-05-28 (#275): outbound MCP-Apps notifications (`ui/update-model-context`, `ui/open-link`, `ui/request-display-mode`) routed through spec-canonical App methods (`app.updateModelContext` / `app.openLink` / `app.requestDisplayMode`); raw `postToParent` for these surfaces retired. `ui/message` stays on raw postMessage — App.sendMessage's closed zod schema strips our `_meta.ggui.userAction.*` extension, which the agent's structured-action observability depends on; spec doesn't currently accommodate a metadata extension on `ui/message`. Future tightening options: upstream PR for ext-apps ./styles subpath export (decouples helpers from the App class); subpath-export contract-validator behind @ggui-ai/protocol/validation so iframe can opt-in to a slim observer-only path; tree-shake openrouter-models behind a subpath; surface a `ui/message` metadata extension point upstream so the `_meta.ggui.userAction` carrier can move onto `app.sendMessage` too.
